body:
Hi Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share that [GreenPulse](companies/greenpulse) just closed a small bridge from our existing angels, which gives us the runway to hit our next two milestones before we go out for a proper Series A. The pilot with the municipal utility in Austin is now live and we're seeing roughly 18% reduction in grid balancing costs in the first three weeks, which is ahead of our internal projections. I know you mentioned wanting to see real-world performance data before moving forward, so I figured this was the right moment to reconnect and share the early numbers. Would love to find 30 minutes this week or next to walk you through the dashboard and talk about what a deeper partnership with [Halfway Capital](funds/halfway-capital) could look like. Let me know what works on your end.

— Dev
